title: Tracardi
description: Open-source API-first Customer Data Platform (CDP) for collecting events, building profiles and segments, and orchestrating real-time customer journeys.
installation: Tracardi is a multi-container stack; this template runs ONLY the primary API/server image tracardi/tracardi-api on internal port 80. It REQUIRES an external Elasticsearch (7.x) or OpenSearch cluster as its primary datastore for all events/profiles/segments - Elasticsearch is NOT one of the supported operator add-ons, so deploy it separately (e.g. docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.17.x) and point ELASTIC_HOST at it (default here http://elasticsearch:9200) before Tracardi will start. The MySQL config DB is provisioned via the mariadb add-on and Redis cache via the valkey add-on. Deploy these COMPANION services from the same Tracardi image family, sharing the SAME ELASTIC_HOST / REDIS_HOST / MYSQL_HOST env values: tracardi/tracardi-gui (the web admin GUI, internal port 80 - expose it with its own Service/Ingress, this is what operators log into), tracardi/update-worker (background workflow/segmentation worker), and tracardi/apm (auto profile-merging / background processing worker). Set PRODUCTION=yes and DEMO=no for a clean install. ROTATE before exposing: the mariadb (MYSQL) and any admin passwords; the default admin login is created on first boot (admin@tracardi.com) - change it immediately. AUTOLOAD_BRIDGE/DEMO data and the default credentials are for evaluation only.
